description_long: This is a tall, stone obelisk monument set on a multi-tiered square base, situated in a grassy area flanked by two large, leafy trees. The obelisk itself is slender and tapers smoothly towards a pointed tip, with a small decorative finial at the very top. The base is composed of several stacked rectangular stone blocks, each slightly smaller than the one below, creating a stepped appearance. The monument appears to be made of light gray stone, possibly granite or marble, and is weathered but intact. There are no visible inscriptions or engravings on the obelisk from these views, and the surface is mostly smooth with some minor textural variation. The surrounding area is open, with the obelisk centrally positioned between the two trees, and the ground is covered with short grass.
description: A tall, slender stone obelisk with a stepped square base, set between two large leafy trees on a grassy patch. The monument is light gray and features a pointed tip with a small finial.
description_view_0: The obelisk is centered between two large trees, with its full height and stepped base clearly visible on a grassy surface.
description_view_1: The obelisk is partially obscured by the right tree, but the stepped base and pointed tip remain visible from an angled perspective.
description_view_2: The obelisk is seen from the opposite side, with both trees framing it and the base slightly angled, showing more of the left side.
description_view_3: The view is mostly dominated by the right tree, with only the tip and a small portion of the obelisk visible behind the foliage.
attribute_ornamentation: A small decorative finial is present at the tip; otherwise, no visible ornamentation or carvings.
attribute_base_design: The base is a multi-tiered, square structure made of stacked stone blocks, each tier slightly smaller than the one below, forming a stepped platform. The stone appears weathered and solid, with no visible decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is pointed and capped with a small, rounded finial, giving it a classic monument appearance.
attribute_surrounding_features: Two large leafy trees flank the obelisk on either side, and the ground is covered with short grass. No other notable features are present.
